clusters.title: Top Italian diplomat cancels U.S. trip after prime minister slams Trump's claim about G7 photo

items.title: Top Italian diplomat cancels U.S. trip after prime minister slams Trump's claim about G7 photo
items.standfirst: Italy's top diplomat canceled a trip to the U.S. after Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni slammed President Trump's claims that she "begged" him for a photo at the G7 summit. The dispute erupted after Trump told Italian broadcaster La7 that Meloni had pleaded with him for a photo at the meeting of leading industrialized nations in the French resort of Evian-les-Bains earlier this week.
items.content: Italy's top diplomat canceled a trip to the U.S. after Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni slammed President Trump's claims that she "begged" him for a photo at the G7 summit. The dispute erupted after Trump told Italian broadcaster La7 that Meloni had pleaded with him for a photo at the meeting of leading industrialized nations in the French resort of Evian-les-Bains earlier this week.

items.title: Italy's Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo at G7
items.standfirst: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.
items.content: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.

items.title: Italy: Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo
items.standfirst: Donald Trump claimed that Giorgia Meloni had 'begged' for a photo with him during the recent G7 summit. He added that he wasn’t obliged to do it but that he felt sorry for her and agreed.
items.content: Donald Trump claimed that Giorgia Meloni had 'begged' for a photo with him during the recent G7 summit. He added that he wasn’t obliged to do it but that he felt sorry for her and agreed.

items.title: Trump ‘totally fabricated’ claim she begged him for a photo, Italy’s Meloni says
items.standfirst: After President Donald Trump said Giorgia Meloni had “begged” him for a photo at the G7 summit earlier this week, Italy’s Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was quick to hit back.
items.content: After President Donald Trump said Giorgia Meloni had “begged” him for a photo at the G7 summit earlier this week, Italy’s Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was quick to hit back.

items.title: Italy PM Meloni ‘stunned’ by Trump’s claims she begged him for a photo
items.standfirst: US president provokes outrage as PM says he ‘totally invented’ story in interview with Italian mediaItaly’s prime minister, Giorgia Meloni, has said Donald Trump “totally invented” a story about her after the US president claimed she begged him to take a photo with her during the G7 summit.The two former allies had appeared to be getting their relationship back on track by having several one-to-ones on the sidelines at the gathering in Évian after falling out in April over the US-Israeli war in Iran. Continue reading...

Continue reading...

items.title: 'Completely made up': Italy's PM on Trump's comments she begged him for photo
items.standfirst: Italian Prime ​Minister Giorgia Meloni has accused Donald Trump of making up a story about her, after ‌the US president told an Italian TV channel that she had "begged" him to take a picture with her at the G7 summit in France.
items.content: Italian Prime ​Minister Giorgia Meloni has accused Donald Trump of making up a story about her, after ‌the US president told an Italian TV channel that she had "begged" him to take a picture with her at the G7 summit in France.

ai_summary: Italy's top diplomat cancels US trip
Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni slams Trump
Trump claims Meloni begged for photo

clusters.title: Western Europe braces for more extreme heat as temperatures continue to climb

items.title: Western Europe braces for more extreme heat as temperatures continue to climb
items.standfirst: Western Europe sweltered under a punishing heatwave on Friday, with temperatures expected to climb further in the coming days and potentially shatter more records, prompting authorities across the continent to issue warnings and brace for prolonged extreme weather. In France, hundreds of schools were forced to tweak their timetables to cope.
items.content: Western Europe sweltered under a punishing heatwave on Friday, with temperatures expected to climb further in the coming days and potentially shatter more records, prompting authorities across the continent to issue warnings and brace for prolonged extreme weather. In France, hundreds of schools were forced to tweak their timetables to cope.

items.title: Macron calls for vigilance as western Europe faces second heatwave of year
items.standfirst: More than half of France’s population under severe weather warning with temperatures expected to exceed 40CMore than half of France’s population is under a severe weather warning as large swathes of western Europe endure the second extreme heat event of the year, with temperatures expected to exceed 40C (104F).The French president called for “extreme vigilance”, urging people to “take care of our oldest and most vulnerable people” and follow government advice. “We are going through difficult days,” Emmanuel Macron said. Continue reading...

Continue reading...

clusters.title: Morocco beat Scotland 1–0 as Saibari scores fastest World Cup 2026 goal

items.title: Morocco beat Scotland 1–0 as Saibari scores fastest World Cup 2026 goal
items.standfirst: Morocco hold onto slender lead despite Scotland's late charge for an equaliser in Group C match at Boston Stadium.
items.content: Morocco hold onto slender lead despite Scotland's late charge for an equaliser in Group C match at Boston Stadium.

items.title: World Cup 2026: Saibari's early goal hands Morocco narrow win over Scotland
items.standfirst: Ismael Saibari scored the fastest goal of the World Cup so far after just 71 seconds as Morocco secured a narrow 1-0 win over Scotland on Friday to close in on a place in the knockout round. The Scots pushed hard for an equaliser in the ⁠secondhalf but never had a shot on target during the match.
items.content: Ismael Saibari scored the fastest goal of the World Cup so far after just 71 seconds as Morocco secured a narrow 1-0 win over Scotland on Friday to close in on a place in the knockout round. The Scots pushed hard for an equaliser in the ⁠secondhalf but never had a shot on target during the match.

ai_summary: Saibari scores fastest World Cup goal
Win closes in on knockout round

clusters.title: James Burrows, legendary director of Cheers and Friends, dies aged 85

items.title: James Burrows, legendary director of Cheers and Friends, dies aged 85
items.standfirst: Best-known as co-creator of sitcom Cheers, Burrows directed more than 1,000 episodes of other classics including the Big Bang Theory and Will and Grace.
items.content: Best-known as co-creator of sitcom Cheers, Burrows directed more than 1,000 episodes of other classics including the Big Bang Theory and Will and Grace.

items.title: James Burrows, co-creator of "Cheers" and prolific director, dies at 85
items.standfirst: James Burrows directed more than 1,000 episodes of television, including every episode of the original "Will & Grace."
items.content: James Burrows directed more than 1,000 episodes of television, including every episode of the original "Will & Grace."

items.title: "Cheers" co-creator James Burrows dies at 85
items.standfirst: Director James Burrows co-created the landmark comedy "Cheers" and directed more than 50 pilot episodes. He died at 85 on Friday.
items.content: Director James Burrows co-created the landmark comedy "Cheers" and directed more than 50 pilot episodes. He died at 85 on Friday.

ai_summary: James Burrows dies at 85 years old
Worked on Big Bang Theory and Friends

clusters.title: Trump unveils new Air Force One, a $400 million plane gifted by Qatar
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump Unveils New Air Force One

items.title: Trump unveils new Air Force One, a $400 million plane gifted by Qatar
items.standfirst: "This is considered the world's most luxurious plane," the president said in front of the enormous new jet.
items.content: "This is considered the world's most luxurious plane," the president said in front of the enormous new jet.

items.title: Trump unveils new Air Force One, gifted from Qatar
items.standfirst: President Trump unveiled what's meant to become the new Air Force One, a gift from the government of Qatar. Plus, new fighting erupted between Israel and Lebanon before they signed a new ceasefire. Nicole Killion has all this and more from the White House.
items.content: President Trump unveiled what's meant to become the new Air Force One, a gift from the government of Qatar. Plus, new fighting erupted between Israel and Lebanon before they signed a new ceasefire. Nicole Killion has all this and more from the White House.

items.title: Air Force One, gifted to Trump from Qatar, arrives at Joint Base Andrews
items.standfirst: The luxury Boeing 747, initially valued at $400 million, arrived ahead of schedule on Friday. The jet caused controversy as one of the biggest foreign gifts ever received by the U.S. government.
items.content: The luxury Boeing 747, initially valued at $400 million, arrived ahead of schedule on Friday. The jet caused controversy as one of the biggest foreign gifts ever received by the U.S. government. (Image credit: Alex Wong)

items.title: Trump unveils Qatari-gifted jet serving as new Air Force One
items.standfirst: President Trump on Friday unveiled the new Air Force One, a $400 million Boeing 747-8 jet, gifted by Qatar.
items.content: President Trump on Friday unveiled the new Air Force One, a $400 million Boeing 747-8 jet, gifted by Qatar.

ai_summary: Trump unveils new Air Force One
